data.content: Implementation review approved. Confirmed the stale rail was removed from the overview layout and replaced with a tab-strip cue/dialog; dialog includes stale list, Select all/Oldest five/Clear, dispatch default and configured-agent override selection, queued/running status cues, and updated-age descending order. Built-in browser review at default viewport showed no horizontal clipping. Sanity gates passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
